targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(detected_at, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, site_id AS metric, count() AS value FROM network_health.gold_anomaly_flags FINAL WHERE detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric

SELECT window_start AS time, site_id AS metric, avg(health_score) AS value FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time, metric
SELECT site_id, argMax(health_score, window_start) AS health_score FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 48 HOUR GROUP BY site_id ORDER BY site_id
SELECT device_id, site_id, interface_name, anomaly_type, anomaly_subtype, score, detected_at FROM network_health.gold_anomaly_flags FINAL ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT site_id, window_start, health_score, is_degraded, pct_interfaces_saturated, pct_interfaces_down, critical_syslog_count FROM network_health.gold_site_health_hourly FINAL WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND is_degraded = 1 ORDER BY window_start DESC, site_id
